title: More Lucky Blocks 2 (Too much Lucky Blocks)
description: This project adds Lucky Blocks + new items, armor and LOTS OF more Stuff! (NO QUILT)
body:
What does the mod offer?

- Copper Equipment (pickaxe, hoe, sword, axe, shovel, helmet, chest plate, pants, and boots)

- Tiered Lucky Blocks (meaning you can upgrade Lucky Blocks with materials, e.g.: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1761e948c10ba6e195ae56ec95a2e26a542290d7_0.webp))

- Events, e.g., Obsidian Cage

Why should I download the mod?

If you want more luck and randomness, more rewards, the chance to troll your friends, and new items obtainable only from Lucky Blocks.

If you need more information, check these links: Trailer 1: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9v1zom, Trailer 2: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9vorrc, Trailer 3: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9vc0fq

UPDATE 1: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9wkj2u

Sorry for no Update 2 Trailer

UPDATE 3 TRAILER: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9zu16i

Update 4 RANDOM RELEASE: NO TRAILER :(

UPDATE 4.1 (soon!): A Book for the Recipes! Please use the JEI mod until version 4.1 is released! Trailer: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/xa508uq

And NOW HAVE FUN!
